arts.ttl: Everton vs Aston Villa team news LIVE! New Moyes era gets underway
arts.sum: David Moyes admits he has rejoined a "different" Everton to the one he left 12 years ago, but believes new owners The Friedkin Group have already put the club on the path towards a brighter future. For many years it has been stifled because of the financial situation, the new owners are clearing as much of that up and there is still a bit to be done but the new owners have an ambition to try to get Everton back nearer the top.

arts.ttl: Ex-Villa boss Ward named Republic of Ireland head coach
arts.sum: Former Aston Villa manager Carla Ward is appointed Republic of Ireland head coach, replacing Eileen Gleeson.

arts.ttl: Yasin Ozcan plan revealed as technical director lifts lid on Aston Villa transfer
arts.sum: However, while the first – Donyell Malen – will come in and hopefully contribute quickly, the teenage centre-back is expected to remain with his current club for the rest of the season. I think he has a lot of potential.

arts.ttl: Everton vs Aston Villa LIVE - team news, TV channel, kick-off time, score and commentary stream
arts.athr: liverpool.news@trinitymirror.com (Joe Thomas, Chris Beesley, Paul Wheelock, Joe Rimmer)
arts.sum: Live coverage of Everton vs Aston Villa in the Premier League at Goodison Park as David Moyes returns

arts.ttl: Insistence Monchi has held talks for Aston Villa transfer – But he can’t use player as makeweight
arts.sum: Monchi has been in Seville to negotiate a deal for Sevilla’s Loïc Badé but can’t use Diego Carlos as a makeweight in the deal. That’s according to Estadio Deportivo, who report the Brazilian won’t be returning to his former club in any capacity. The newspaper reports that Monchi is on the hunt for a centre-back The post Insistence Monchi has held talks for Aston Villa transfer – But he can’t use player as makeweight appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Donyell Malen reveals Aston Villa text messages which helped to seal his transfer
arts.sum: New Aston Villa signing Donyell Malen has revealed that compatriot and his reunited teammate Ian Maatsen helped to sell the transfer to the forward after delivering a glowing assessment of the club he himself only joined in the summer transfer window. Having been in England with Arsenal previously, spending a couple of years in the Gunners' academy under Arsene Wenger, it's a 'dream come true' for the Dutchman to make a return to the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Everton 'in the hunt' with Sunderland, Sheffield United for £10m international striker
arts.sum: Everton are reportedly in the race to re-sign forward Tom Cannon, who is also attracting interest from the likes of Sunderland and Sheffield United.

arts.ttl: Tottenham and Everton need to pay $20m if they want midfielder, source at Brazilian club shares
arts.sum: Everton and Tottenham will need at least $20m if they wish to sign Richard Ríos from Palmeiras this month. That’s according to Caracol Radio and AS Colombia, who both cover the Colombian midfielder today. arts.ttl: Report: Everton now keen to sign £7.5m forward whose agent is actually the brother of David Moyes
Everton, Leicester City 'put off' swoop for Premier League defender by eye-catching asking price
arts.sum: Southampton are reportedly demanding £7m for the services of Kyle Walker-Peters, with Everton and Leicester currently unwilling to pay such a fee for the defender.
